site.title: Breakthru
site.description: Online personal training by Myer Bevan — sustainable strength and transformation.

hero.headline: About the Founder
hero.body:
Hi, I'm Myer.

I am a professional athlete who has played football around the world for the past ten years, as well as playing for the New Zealand National team. I am also a qualified fitness coach.

Through my experiences being a professional athlete, I fell in love with the gym and that love then transitioned into becoming a fitness coach / personal trainer by trade. The gym is a place that cannot only help you gain confidence and transform your body, but a place that can transform your mind.

I've learnt that true transformation doesn't come from extreme measures and quick fixes, but from understanding your body, building habits that last, and creating a mindset and lifestyle you truly enjoy.

My purpose? To help you gain confidence, gain strength and work with you to create a fitness journey you enjoy. Whether you've never trained before, or you're looking to get just that 1% better, I'm here to help you chase those goals and Breakthru the obstacles in your way.

Fitness should be something you enjoy, not something you dread.

Breakthru is here to transform your body and your mind.

Are you ready?
hero.trustSignal: Home to all levels of fitness. Start your transformation today.
hero.imageAlt: Myer Bevan — Breakthru online personal trainer

services.headline: Choose your breakthru
services.body: Select the plan that fits you and become part of this movement

tiers.title: 12 Week Programme
tiers.description: A one off training programme fully tailored to you - built around your body and your goals. Putting structure into your workouts and creating habits.
features: Tailored to your goals and experience level

tiers.title: Join Breakthru
tiers.description: The full Breakthru experience - everything you need to train, ideas on nutrition and day to day guidance around workouts. Breakthru your obstacles and become the best version of you.

tiers.title: Eat Like Me — 30 Day Meal Plan
tiers.description: Creating habits and consistency through fuelling. Breakthru's founders 30 day meal plan thats designed to build a sustainable relationship with food and give you ideas on what to eat day to day.

form.headline: Is Breakthru right for you?
form.body: Don't know if we're right for you? Apply here and help the team understand your goals, your obstacles and let's build a genuine transformation. Time to Breakthru!
form.responseNote: The Breakthru team will assess and review each application and will get in touch.

footer.tagline: Online personal training by Myer Bevan — former NZ international footballer

leadQualification.successMessage: Application received — Myer reviews every submission personally and will be in touch within 48 hours.
